prompt:
A cozy desk scene in a dimly lit room where a computer monitor or holographic display shows a stylized DSPACE quest hub screen with several new quest icons highlighted by subtle glow or “new” indicators (using color and iconography instead of readable text). A digital clock or small calendar on the desk shows the passage of time through simple symbols, suggesting that the player is checking back regularly for new challenges. A mug and a small plant add to the lived-in feel.

Near-future solarpunk aesthetic with soft, warm lighting and clean lines. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no legible UI text or brand logos; quest names and labels are represented as abstract bars or icons. The composition should convey the idea of returning often to check for fresh quests.
